# Copilot instructions (emeraldstms)

## Stack + architecture
- Laravel 12 backend with Inertia.js React frontend.
- Pages live in `resources/js/pages/*` and are rendered by `Inertia::render('...')` from PHP routes/controllers.
- Route helpers in TS are generated by Laravel Wayfinder into `resources/js/routes/*` (treat these as generated; prefer changing PHP routes, not editing generated TS).

## Domain model conventions
- `Students` can be referenced by numeric `id` or string `tuteeid`.
- `Tutors` can be referenced by numeric `id` or string `tutorid`.
- `Tutorials` store schedule in `tutorials.tutorial_schedule` (JSON array of `{ days: string[], start_time: string, end_time: string }`) plus `start_date`/`end_date` range.
  - See `app/Models/Tutorials.php` and `database/migrations/2026_01_02_135738_create_tutorials_table.php`.

## Scheduling rules (Tutorials)
- When creating/updating tutorials, validate conflicts server-side (authoritative) and return validation errors for Inertia.
  - Implementation lives in `app/Http/Controllers/TutorialsController.php`.
- Frontend can compute “available tutors” using the schedule JSON + date range, but must not be the only enforcement.

## UI patterns
- Use existing layout + components:
  - Layout: `resources/js/layouts/app-layout.tsx`
  - Shared UI components: `resources/js/components/ui/*`
- Tailwind utilities should use existing theme tokens (`bg-background`, `text-muted-foreground`, etc.); avoid hard-coded colors.

## Common workflows
- Dev: `composer run dev` (runs Laravel server, queue worker, and Vite).
- Build: `npm run build`.
- Backend formatting: `vendor/bin/pint`.
- Frontend formatting: `npm run format`.
- Frontend lint: `npm run lint`.
- Tests: `php vendor/bin/pest`.

## CI expectations
- GitHub Actions runs `npm ci`, `composer install`, `npm run build`, and `./vendor/bin/pest`.
- Lint workflow runs Pint + Prettier + ESLint.
